caption: A man wearing a tall, silver, textured headpiece and glasses is seated in a studio setting. He is dressed in a white long-sleeved shirt with a brown bow tie and suspenders, and he wears black over-ear headphones. He is positioned in front of a black microphone. Behind him is a wall decorated with various framed photographs and clothing items on hangers. A logo featuring a microphone and the text "BOSS TALK JOY PODCAST" appears on the left and right sides of the scene. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, speaking and shifting his facial expressions slightly, with his mouth open in the first two frames and closing in the latter two. His gaze remains directed slightly to the left of the camera as he speaks.
